warnings: energy_finite: total/electronic energy = -6261.72886607537 (must be a finite number)
scf_converged: True (SCF must converge for the energy/orbitals to be meaningful)

prose: The frontier orbitals calculation on furan was performed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set, in the gas phase, as specified under the tier 'standard'. The calculation converged successfully in 9 SCF cycles, with the HOMO energy at -6.3597638 eV, the LUMO energy at -0.1024036 eV, and an HOMO-LUMO gap of approximately 6.2574 eV. The method used was B3LYP/def2-TZVP in PySCF.
